textPlain: Fascinating topic, especially given how E/I imbalance is linked to several neuropsychiatric disorders such as epilepsy, autism or schizophrenia. [1]Coincidentally, I published a paper in the Journal of Neuroscience during my PhD demonstrating with a simple mathematical model how E/I balance enabled neurons to be highly sensitive to precise spike timing. [2][1] https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC6742424/[2] https://www.jneurosci.org/content/31/47/17193.short
